project.name: MemberBase
project.description: Open-source PHP NGO member management system with accounting, CSV import, REST API and role-based access control

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Docker image build for the PHP/Apache runtime: installs pdftk-java and GD build dependencies (libpng, libjpeg, libfreetype) for QR-bill PNG rendering, enables Apache modules (rewrite, headers, expires, deflate, brotli), copies the custom vhost config, tunes PHP error_reporting, and prepares writable logs/conf directories.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-stage Dockerfile based on the official php:8.2-apache image; GD is compiled with freetype/jpeg support specifically for endroid/qr-code PNG rendering used by the Swiss QR-bill vendor library.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Local development orchestration: builds the PHP app from the project Dockerfile, and runs MariaDB, Mailpit (SMTP testing), and Adminer (DB admin UI) as companion services with health-checked startup ordering.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a MariaDB healthcheck with depends_on.condition: service_healthy so the PHP container waits for the database to be ready before starting.

nodes.name: docker-compose.test.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose override file used for the E2E/CI test environment, pointing the php service at a separate members_test database.

nodes.name: backup.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that proves the backup/restore cycle is faithful: seeds a MariaDB database with schema + fixture data, runs html/tools/backup.sh, drops every table, runs html/tools/restore.sh, then asserts row counts and sums match the pre-drop baseline.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a MariaDB service container with a health check and raw mysql CLI assertions rather than a test framework, to validate the SQL dump round-trip end-to-end.

nodes.name: e2e.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow running the Playwright end-to-end suite: boots the app via Docker Compose (base + test overrides), waits for the login page to respond, resets the test database, and runs Playwright with report upload on failure.

nodes.name: unit.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow running the PHPUnit unit test suite on PHP 8.2 (matching the production runtime) after installing Composer dev dependencies, on every push to main and pull request.

nodes.name: upgrade.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow proving the migration runner converges a legacy pre-migrations database to the current schema: loads legacy.sql, runs migrate.php, asserts schema/data/tracking convergence, and checks idempotence and drift-free --status.
nodes.languageNotes: Verifies migration idempotence by asserting the second run reports no pending migrations, and drift detection via migrate.php --status exit code.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Chronological changelog of MemberBase releases from v2.0.0 through v5.2.0, documenting new features, improvements, fixes, breaking changes, and security/technical notes for each version.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Project-level development notes for AI-assisted coding: commit identity rules, PHP/vendor dependency policy, code conventions (English comments, no hardcoded UI strings), i18n locale bundles, CSRF protection, htmx redirect conventions, CSV import wizard, testing strategy, DB migrations workflow, and release process.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contributor guide covering local setup, tech stack, coding guidelines (CSRF, migrations, dirty-form guard), commit conventions, E2E/unit testing, and how to report bugs or suggest features.

nodes.name: DESIGN.md
nodes.summary: Design system reference for Casa Membres: color palette, typography, UI components (navbar, DataTable, forms, badges, cards), a Bootstrap 4-to-5 upgrade checklist, and do's/don'ts.

nodes.name: MIGRATION_PROD.md
nodes.summary: Production database migration guide: applying pending migrations via the workflow, backup/restore procedures, historical record of past migrations, HTTP security headers, Apache API routing configuration, and role attribution notes.

nodes.name: PRODUCT.md
nodes.summary: Product brief defining MemberBase's target register, user personas, purpose, brand personality, anti-references, design principles, and accessibility commitments.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Main project README for MemberBase: history, feature overview (member management, segments/combined segments, accounting/compta, activity views, donation PDF attestations, emails, export, settings, multilingual UI, REST API), tech stack, directory structure, fresh install (web installer and Docker) and upgrade instructions, deployment, and security/auth/Fail2Ban notes.

nodes.name: composer.json
nodes.summary: Composer manifest declaring the project as a PHP AGPL-licensed package with PHPUnit as a dev dependency and a composer script for running unit tests.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: npm manifest for the project's tooling side, defining metadata and devDependencies (Playwright) used to run the end-to-end test suite.

nodes.name: phpunit.xml
nodes.summary: PHPUnit configuration wiring up the unit test suite bootstrap and test directory used to run business-logic tests without a database.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Developer convenience Makefile wrapping Docker Compose lifecycle (up/down/logs/shell/db), DB import/backup/restore, migration commands, Playwright/PHPUnit test targets, and the release/publish-site automation scripts.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses .PHONY targets and $(VAR) parameters (e.g. `make release VERSION=x.y.z`, `make backup FILE=...`) to parameterize Docker Compose and CLI tool invocations.

nodes.name: contact_type
nodes.summary: Lookup table of contact types (code, label, icon, sort order) used to categorize contacts (e.g. individual, company, institution).

nodes.name: contact
nodes.summary: Core contact/member table storing identity, address, phone/email, sex, contact type, title, comment, birthday, and audit timestamps/status.

nodes.name: segment
nodes.summary: Defines named member segments (filters/groups) with visibility, ordering, and hidden flags used to organize and filter contacts.

nodes.name: contact_segment
nodes.summary: Join table associating contacts with segments, tracking who added the membership and when.

nodes.name: segment_cascade_rule
nodes.summary: Defines cascade rules that propagate segment membership from a source segment to a target segment.

nodes.name: contact_properties
nodes.summary: Key/value custom property store for contacts, storing arbitrary parameter/date/value attributes per contact.

nodes.name: suivi_task
nodes.summary: Follow-up/task tracking table storing titles, bodies, priority, due dates, completion timestamps, and creator/assignee references per contact.

nodes.name: combined_segment
nodes.summary: Defines composite segments built by combining multiple individual segments, with filter and ordering metadata.

nodes.name: combined_segment_member
nodes.summary: Join table linking combined segments to their constituent member segments.

nodes.name: compta_type
nodes.summary: Accounting entry type lookup table storing label, color, default libellé (label), sort order, and boolean flags for cotisation/donation-exclusion/institutional/financial-institution/company/archived classification.

nodes.name: contact_type_compta_type
nodes.summary: Join table mapping contact types to allowed/default accounting (compta) types.

nodes.name: compta
nodes.summary: Accounting/financial transaction entries table recording cotisations and donations against contacts.

nodes.name: maxval
nodes.summary: Small counter/sequence table used to track maximum values (e.g. reference numbers) across the application.

nodes.name: app_settings
nodes.summary: Key/value application settings table storing global configuration used across the app.

nodes.name: app_users
nodes.summary: Application user accounts table storing login credentials, roles, and locale, used for authentication and authorization.

nodes.name: audit_log
nodes.summary: Audit trail table recording user actions and changes across the application for traceability.

nodes.name: email_templates
nodes.summary: Stores reusable email template content (subject/body) used when sending member communications.

nodes.name: email_log
nodes.summary: Log table recording sent emails (recipient, template, status, timestamp) for auditing communications.

nodes.name: api_rate_limit
nodes.summary: Tracks API request counts per client/key to enforce rate limiting on the REST API.

nodes.name: schema_migrations
nodes.summary: Tracks applied database migrations by filename and checksum, used by the migration tooling to detect pending migrations and schema drift.

nodes.name: BootstrapXL.css
nodes.summary: Tiny media-query override that widens the Bootstrap .container to 1570px on extra-large screens (min-width 1600px).

nodes.name: custom.css
nodes.summary: Application-wide custom stylesheet defining the MemberBase design system via CSS custom properties (brand colors, ink/surface/border tones, male/female/danger accents) and overriding Bootstrap components (buttons, navbar, tables, dropdowns, forms) to match the Casa Alianza visual identity.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a `:root` custom-property palette (`--ca-*`) as the single source of truth for brand colors, consumed throughout the rest of the file and presumably other stylesheets/components.

nodes.name: docs.css
nodes.summary: Vendored Bootstrap 3 documentation stylesheet (bs-docs-* classes) covering scaffolding, navigation, footer, mastheads, callouts, code highlights, and responsive test styles; used for the app's documentation-style pages rather than authored for MemberBase itself.
nodes.languageNotes: Legacy Bootstrap 3 docs CSS organized by a table-of-contents comment header; largely unmodified vendor code.

nodes.name: navbar-fixed-top.css
nodes.summary: Small color theme for the .bs-docs-nav top navbar: blue background (#6088c1), white links and brand text, and orange (#f9b036) hover/focus highlight.

nodes.name: legacy.sql
nodes.summary: Pre-migration database snapshot fixture: recreates the schema/data state before the versioned migrations existed (users table not yet renamed to contact, compta.sum as VARCHAR, no schema_migrations table). Used by the CI upgrade test to verify that migrate.php correctly converges a legacy, dirty database to the current schema.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately includes 'dirty' data (comma decimals, empty strings, non-numeric sums) to exercise migration data-cleanup logic.

nodes.name: users
nodes.summary: Legacy `users` table definition (pre-migration 0015, before rename to `contact`), missing the `email_alt` column added by migration 0001.

nodes.name: compta
nodes.summary: Legacy `compta` (accounting entries) table with `sum` stored as VARCHAR(64) including dirty values, which migration 0002 must convert to DECIMAL and clean.

nodes.name: app_users
nodes.summary: Legacy `app_users` table without the `locale` column, which migration 0003 must add.

nodes.name: metagroup
nodes.summary: Legacy `metagroup` table with a `teamid` column, which migration 0014 renames to `segmentid`.

nodes.name: team
nodes.summary: Legacy `team` table, which migration 0014 renames to `segment`.

nodes.name: app_settings
nodes.summary: Legacy `app_settings` key/value table with `value` as VARCHAR(255), which migration 0004 must widen to TEXT.

nodes.name: seed.sql
nodes.summary: Deterministic seed data for the members_test database used by Playwright E2E tests: app users for each role (admin/manager/user/readonly), sample contacts covering active/lapsed/archived/no-cotisation cases, segments, combined_segment categories, compta entries, and app_settings including Mailpit SMTP config.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately models edge cases (lapsed members, member with no email, member exempt from cotisation tracking) so E2E tests can assert on them.

nodes.name: reset-db.sh
nodes.summary: Test database reset script that drops and recreates the members_test MariaDB database, applies schema.sql and seed.sql, writes conf/db.php, baselines migrations, and purges the Mailpit inbox so E2E tests start from a clean deterministic state.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses `docker compose exec` to pipe SQL files directly into the mariadb container rather than mounting them as init scripts, allowing repeated resets without container restarts.

nodes.name: bug_report.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue form template for bug reports, structuring fields for description, labels, and body sections.

nodes.name: feature_request.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue form template for feature requests, structuring fields for description, labels, and body sections.

nodes.name: pull_request_template.md
nodes.summary: Pull request template prompting contributors to describe what the PR does, why, changes made, testing performed, and a completion checklist.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Configuration for the impeccable design-review tool, defining a detector used for UI/UX audits of the project.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore list for the Understand-Anything analyzer, excluding vendored assets, test artifacts, logs, and generated directories from knowledge-graph scans.

nodes.name: apache.conf
nodes.summary: Apache VirtualHost configuration for the local Docker environment: defines the document root, pretty-URL RewriteRules mapping /api/* paths to the PHP API handlers, static-asset cache headers, and security headers (X-Frame-Options, HSTS, CSP report-only).
nodes.languageNotes: RewriteRule mappings mirror html/api/.htaccess exactly, so both the Docker vhost and any Apache-based prod deployment resolve REST-style /api/contacts, /api/compta, /api/suivi, /api/segments URLs to the same PHP scripts.

nodes.name: 0F5B592E883E10E5F744B70B861AE02B.txt
nodes.summary: Small text file, likely a domain/host verification token placed at the web root (e.g. for a hosting or SSL provider).

nodes.name: _bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: Shared bootstrap included by every REST endpoint under html/api/: wires up the app context, authorization helpers (canRead/canWrite), and the apiError() JSON error responder.

nodes.name: apiError
nodes.summary: Emits a JSON error response with the given HTTP status code and message, logging the failure via auditLog before halting the request.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache rewrite rules for the /api directory translating REST-style paths (contacts/segments/compta/suivi with optional numeric id and sub-resource) into query-string calls on the corresponding PHP scripts.

nodes.name: compta-types.php
nodes.summary: Read-only REST endpoint (GET /api/compta-types) returning the list of accounting entry types ordered by sort order, sourced from the preloaded $comptaTypes global.

nodes.name: compta.php
nodes.summary: REST CRUD endpoint for accounting entries (compta) at /api/compta: lists, filters by date range/type, and creates, updates, and deletes entries against the Compta model, with audit logging on every write.

nodes.name: entryToArray
nodes.summary: Serializes a Compta entity into the plain array shape returned by the JSON API.

nodes.name: requestBody
nodes.summary: Reads and JSON-decodes the raw HTTP request body, erroring out if the payload is not a valid object/array.

nodes.name: applyFields
nodes.summary: Applies whitelisted fields from a decoded request body onto a Compta entity, handling type conversion (amount, date) and unquoting of text fields.

nodes.name: validateTypeId
nodes.summary: Validates that a submitted compta type id is set, erroring with 400 otherwise.

nodes.name: handleList
nodes.summary: Handles GET /api/compta list requests, filtering entries by contact id and optional year/date bounds and returning them as JSON.

nodes.name: handleGet
nodes.summary: Handles GET /api/compta/{id}, returning a single accounting entry or 404.

nodes.name: handleCreate
nodes.summary: Handles POST /api/compta, validating required fields, creating a new Compta entry, and writing an audit log entry with the contact's updated total.

nodes.name: handleUpdate
nodes.summary: Handles PUT/PATCH /api/compta/{id}, applying updated fields to an existing entry and logging the change.

nodes.name: handleDelete
nodes.summary: Handles DELETE /api/compta/{id}, removing the entry and recording the deletion in the audit log.

nodes.name: suivi.php
nodes.summary: REST CRUD endpoint for follow-up/tracking entries (suivi) at /api/suivi: lists entries by contact, and creates, updates, and deletes them against the UserProperty model with audit logging.

nodes.name: entryToArray
nodes.summary: Serializes a UserProperty (suivi) entity into the JSON API's plain array shape.

nodes.name: requestBody
nodes.summary: Reads and JSON-decodes the raw HTTP request body for suivi write operations.

nodes.name: loadEntry
nodes.summary: Loads and authorizes a suivi entry by id, erroring with 404 if it does not exist.

nodes.name: handleList
nodes.summary: Handles GET /api/suivi list requests, filtering by contact id and returning matching entries as JSON.

nodes.name: handleGet
nodes.summary: Handles GET /api/suivi/{id}, returning a single follow-up entry.

nodes.name: handleCreate
nodes.summary: Handles POST /api/suivi, validating input, creating a new follow-up property record, and logging the action.

nodes.name: handleUpdate
nodes.summary: Handles PUT/PATCH /api/suivi/{id}, applying updates to an existing follow-up entry with audit logging.

nodes.name: handleDelete
nodes.summary: Handles DELETE /api/suivi/{id}, removing the follow-up entry and logging the deletion.

nodes.name: attestation_bulk.php
nodes.summary: Generates and streams a single merged PDF of donation attestations for every qualifying donor in a given year (filtered by minimum sum), merging individual PDFs with pdftk.
nodes.languageNotes: Relies on the external pdftk binary to concatenate per-donor PDFs into one download.

nodes.name: attestation_don.php
nodes.summary: Generates a single donation attestation PDF for one member and year via pdftk; can also regenerate a previously sent attestation from its email_log entry, reusing the original send date.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: One-line Apache rule (Require all denied) blocking any direct HTTP access to the domain class files in html/classes/.

nodes.name: compta_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the Compta model representing an accounting/cotisation entry: lookup, field accessors, save/remove persistence, and aggregate helpers (typesByUser, activitySummaryByUser) used for reporting.

nodes.name: Compta
nodes.summary: Active-record-style model for an accounting entry (compta), backed by the compta table: loads/saves/deletes a single entry, exposes typed getters/setters, and provides bulk aggregate queries (types-by-user, activity summary by year) consumed by API handlers and reports.

nodes.name: member_filter_class.php
nodes.summary: Resolves saved and ad-hoc member filters (segments) into concrete contact id lists, evaluating criteria such as cotisation status, activity date ranges, and institutional exclusions.

nodes.name: MemberFilter
nodes.summary: Evaluates a stored or virtual member filter definition against the database and returns the matching set of contact ids, supporting cotisation-based, date-bounded, and 'no cotisation' filter kinds.

nodes.name: isVirtual
nodes.summary: Checks whether a given segment id refers to a built-in virtual filter rather than a stored segment.

nodes.name: resolveIds
nodes.summary: Core resolver that turns a filter id into a concrete list of contact ids by branching over filter kind (virtual no-cotisation filter, date-bounded cotisation filter, institutional exclusion) and running the corresponding SQL.

nodes.name: noCotiMembers
nodes.summary: Returns the ids of contacts who have no cotisation (membership fee) records at all.

nodes.name: property_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the UserProperty model backing contact_properties (used for suivi/follow-up entries): lookup, accessors, and save/remove persistence.

nodes.name: UserProperty
nodes.summary: Active-record-style model for a single contact_properties row (a follow-up/suivi entry): loads by id, exposes typed getters/setters, and persists inserts/updates/deletes.

nodes.name: export.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only entry point that streams a full SQL database dump as a download, implemented with a pure-PHP dumper (no mysqldump/exec dependency) so it works on locked-down shared hosting; records the export timestamp in session for the migration UI's backup check.

nodes.name: health.php
nodes.summary: Lightweight health-check endpoint used by monitoring/uptime probes and Docker healthchecks to verify the application and database are reachable.

nodes.name: health_respond
nodes.summary: Emits a JSON health-status response with the given status string and HTTP code.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache access rule denying all direct HTTP requests to the includes directory, forcing all access through index.php.

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Action handlers for login-adjacent operations: logout, password change, locale switch, and admin user management (create/update/delete app users, password reset, audit log flush).

nodes.name: compta.php
nodes.summary: Action handlers for accounting entries: add, update, toggle attestation eligibility, and delete compta entries for a member.

nodes.name: import.php
nodes.summary: Handles the 3-step CSV import wizard actions (upload, apply, resolve duplicates), including field mapping, duplicate detection, and transactional contact creation.

nodes.name: maintenance.php
nodes.summary: Action handler that applies pending database migrations from the admin Health page, requiring a backup confirmation checkbox before running.

nodes.name: members.php
nodes.summary: Placeholder node retained for continuity — this pre-v5.0.0 file path no longer exists in the repository (superseded by contacts.php).

nodes.name: settings.php
nodes.summary: Large action handler covering application settings: general settings, SMTP config and test email, segment/combined-segment CRUD, compta type and contact type management, and email log purge/resend.

nodes.name: suivi.php
nodes.summary: Action handlers for adding, updating, and deleting follow-up (suivi) entries on a member record.

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Core authentication and authorization library: session user resolution, role guards (isAdmin/isManager/canWrite/canRead), CSRF token generation and verification, login/logout, and forced password-change enforcement.
nodes.languageNotes: Centralizes CSRF token issuance/verification used by both htmx headers and hidden form fields, per the project's CSRF protection convention.

nodes.name: bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: Application bootstrap library providing the shared PDO connection accessor, base URL helper, sequence/max-value counter, pending-migration and drift detection wrappers, and the audit log writer.

nodes.name: import_fields.php
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for importable contact fields — labels, allowed field list, and pure normalization helpers for the CSV import wizard (sex/gender normalization, per-field value coercion).
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately side-effect-free so it can be included standalone in the PHPUnit bootstrap without a DB connection.

nodes.name: groups.php
nodes.summary: Placeholder node retained for continuity — this pre-v5.0.0 file path no longer exists in the repository (superseded by segments.php).

nodes.name: metagroups.php
nodes.summary: Placeholder node retained for continuity — this pre-v5.0.0 file path no longer exists in the repository (superseded by combined_segments.php).

nodes.name: authUser
nodes.summary: Resolves the currently authenticated app user from the session, returning null when not logged in.

nodes.name: csrfToken
nodes.summary: Returns the current session's CSRF token, generating a new cryptographically random one if absent.

nodes.name: csrfCheck
nodes.summary: Validates a submitted CSRF token (form field or header) against the session token using a timing-safe comparison.

nodes.name: requireLogin
nodes.summary: Guard that redirects to the login page when no user is authenticated.

nodes.name: requirePasswordChange
nodes.summary: Guard that forces a redirect to the change-password view when the current user's account is flagged as requiring a password reset.

nodes.name: authLogin
nodes.summary: Verifies username/password against app_users, regenerates the session ID on success to prevent fixation, and updates last_login.

nodes.name: authLogout
nodes.summary: Logs the current user out by clearing the session cookie and destroying the session.

nodes.name: mbDbUnavailable
nodes.summary: Emits a JSON 503 error response and exits when the database connection could not be established.

nodes.name: appUrl
nodes.summary: Returns the sanitized base URL (script filename) used to build internal links throughout the app.

nodes.name: updateAndGetMaxVal
nodes.summary: Atomically increments and returns a named sequence value stored in the maxval table, used for generating stable numeric identifiers.

nodes.name: pendingMigrations
nodes.summary: Computes the list of migration files not yet recorded in schema_migrations by diffing the migrations directory against applied versions.

nodes.name: migrationDrift
nodes.summary: Detects checksum drift between applied migrations and their current on-disk contents, flagging files edited after being applied.

nodes.name: auditLog
nodes.summary: Writes a security/audit event row (action, detail, acting user, optional subject user) to the audit_log table.

nodes.name: importFieldLabels
nodes.summary: Returns the canonical map of importable contact field keys to their localized labels — the single source of truth referenced by both the import wizard steps and the allowed-fields list.

nodes.name: importAllowedFields
nodes.summary: Returns the flat list of allowed import field keys, derived from importFieldLabels.

nodes.name: importNormalizeSexe
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw CSV gender/sex value into the app's canonical representation using pattern matching.

nodes.name: importFieldValue
nodes.summary: Dispatches a raw CSV field value through the appropriate per-field normalizer (e.g. sex normalization, unquoting) based on the field name.

nodes.name: importRedirect
nodes.summary: Sends an HTTP redirect header to the given URL and exits, used to bounce between import wizard steps.

nodes.name: migrations.php
nodes.summary: Shared migration engine used by both the CLI (tools/migrate.php) and the admin web Health page: discovers migration files, computes checksums, tracks applied/pending state, runs pending migrations transactionally, and dumps the database schema/data.
nodes.languageNotes: Guardless and side-effect-free by design so both the CLI tool and the admin UI can share the exact same logic.

nodes.name: pure.php
nodes.summary: Collection of pure, dependency-free helper functions: date/timestamp conversion, salutation building (informal and formal), template variable rendering, Swiss IBAN/IDE formatting, compta type/contact type classification, task priority/overdue checks, and cotisation reminder variable assembly.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicitly kept free of $pdo/session dependencies so these functions are unit-testable via tests/unit/*Test.php without the APP_ENTRY bootstrap.

nodes.name: donor_table.php
nodes.summary: Reusable HTML partial rendering a table of donor rows, shared across the donor summary, loyal donors, and new donors views.

nodes.name: menu.php
nodes.summary: Renders the main navigation menu, conditionally showing links based on the current user's role (admin/manager/write/read guards).

nodes.name: actions.php
nodes.summary: Central POST action dispatcher: enforces CSRF verification on state-changing requests, then routes each named action to its handler file via a static action-to-handler map.
nodes.languageNotes: The action-to-handler map is the single dispatch table for the whole app; every mutating request funnels through the CSRF guard here before any handler code runs.

nodes.name: views.php
nodes.summary: Central GET view dispatcher: resolves the requested view against a route table (file, role guard, request overrides, view variable), enforces the guard, handles legacy view redirects, and includes the matched view file.
nodes.languageNotes: A view missing from the route table intentionally renders a 'not found' warning rather than silently including a file, forcing every new view to declare its access guard explicitly.

nodes.name: auth_change_password.php
nodes.summary: Renders the password/locale settings page, including the change-password form and the language selector card (full-page reload on locale change to refresh <html lang>).

nodes.name: compta_delete_confirm.php
nodes.summary: Renders the confirmation dialog shown before deleting an accounting (compta) entry.

nodes.name: compta_delete_do.php
nodes.summary: Placeholder node retained for continuity — this pre-v5.0.0 view file no longer exists in the repository (deletion now handled via the compta.php action handler).

nodes.name: compta_last_entry.php
nodes.summary: Renders the accounting entries list/history for a single member, including a colored type-swatch helper for compta type labels and the entry table.

nodes.name: compta_list.php

nodes.name: mbAllMigrations

nodes.name: mbAppliedMigrations

nodes.name: mbEnsureMigrationsTable
nodes.summary: Creates the schema_migrations tracking table if it does not already exist.

nodes.name: mbPendingMigrations
nodes.summary: Returns the subset of all known migrations not yet present in the applied-migrations set.

nodes.name: mbRunPendingMigrations
nodes.summary: Executes all pending migration SQL files inside a transaction, recording each applied version and checksum, rolling back and reporting the failing file on error.

nodes.name: mbDumpDatabase
nodes.summary: Streams a plain SQL dump of the entire database (schema + data) for the admin export feature, without shelling out to mysqldump.

nodes.name: formatedDateToTimeStamp
nodes.summary: Parses a locale-formatted date string into a Unix timestamp, returning null on invalid input.

nodes.name: timeStampToformatedDate
nodes.summary: Formats a Unix timestamp into the app's display date format.

nodes.name: mbDateTimeBound
nodes.summary: Formats a timestamp as an ISO-like date/time bound string used in SQL range filters.

nodes.name: unquote
nodes.summary: Strips surrounding quote characters from a raw CSV value, used by the import field normalizers.

nodes.name: mbBuildSalutation
nodes.summary: Builds an informal display salutation string from a contact's first name, last name, and society/company.

nodes.name: mbBuildFormalSalutation
nodes.summary: Builds a formal salutation (e.g. for letters/attestations) taking gender/sex into account alongside name and society.

nodes.name: mbRenderTemplate
nodes.summary: Substitutes {{variable}}-style placeholders in an email/attestation template string with provided values.

nodes.name: mbBuildAttestationVars
nodes.summary: Assembles the variable map (salutations, year, app settings) used to render a donation attestation PDF/email.

nodes.name: mbNormalizeCommentWhitespace
nodes.summary: Collapses redundant whitespace in HTML comment text before storage/display.

nodes.name: mbFormatSwissIde
nodes.summary: Formats a raw Swiss enterprise identification (IDE/UID) number into its standard grouped display form.

nodes.name: mbValidComptaTypeColor
nodes.summary: Validates that a compta type color value is within the app's allowed color palette.

nodes.name: mbComptaTypeReturnUrl
nodes.summary: Builds the return-to URL used after editing a compta type, preserving the originating view and tab.

nodes.name: mbDefaultView
nodes.summary: Resolves which view name to render for the current request, falling back to the dashboard when no explicit view is requested.

nodes.name: mbAllowedComptaTypeIds
nodes.summary: Intersects a list of compta type IDs against a restricted allow-list, used to enforce per-role visibility of accounting types.

nodes.name: mbClassifyContactTypeRow
nodes.summary: Classifies a contact type row into a category label based on its institutional/financial/company/society flags.

nodes.name: mbValidTaskPriority
nodes.summary: Validates that a task priority value is one of the allowed priority levels.

nodes.name: mbTaskIsOverdue
nodes.summary: Determines whether a task is overdue by comparing its due date against today, accounting for whether it has already been completed.

nodes.name: mbBuildCotiReminderVars
nodes.summary: Assembles the full variable map (salutations, formatted amounts, QR reference, app settings) used to render a cotisation reminder email/letter.

nodes.name: _lec_type_swatch
nodes.summary: Renders a small colored badge/swatch HTML snippet for a compta type's label and color, used in the entry history table.

nodes.name: donors_lapsed.php
nodes.summary: View template rendering the list of lapsed donors (donors who stopped giving), likely with last-donation date and amount for follow-up.

nodes.name: donors_loyal.php
nodes.summary: View template rendering the list of loyal/recurring donors segment for donor analytics.

nodes.name: donors_new.php
nodes.summary: View template rendering the list of new/first-time donors segment for donor analytics.

nodes.name: donors_summary.php
nodes.summary: Large dashboard view aggregating donor statistics and segments (totals, trends, breakdowns) into the main donor analytics summary page.

nodes.name: import_step1.php
nodes.summary: First step of the CSV import wizard: file upload form for contacts import.

nodes.name: import_step2.php
nodes.summary: Second step of the CSV import wizard: column-mapping preview UI where the user maps CSV columns to importable contact fields.

nodes.name: import_step3.php
nodes.summary: Third step of the CSV import wizard: duplicate-resolution UI presented before finalizing the contact import.

nodes.name: members_lapsed.php
nodes.summary: View template listing members whose membership has lapsed, for renewal follow-up.

nodes.name: settings_app_users.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view listing and managing application user accounts (roles, status, locale) for the CRM's back-office users.

nodes.name: settings_audit_log.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view displaying the audit log of changes/actions performed in the application.

nodes.name: settings_categories.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view for managing contact/member categories used elsewhere in the CRM.

nodes.name: settings_compta_types.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view for managing accounting entry types (compta types), including their default labels used when generating financial entries.

nodes.name: settings_filter_edit.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view for creating/editing a saved contact filter, including segment condition rows rendered via inline render callbacks.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses local closures (renderSegmentCb, renderAddRow) to render repeated filter-condition rows, escaping output with htmlentities.

nodes.name: settings_filters.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view listing saved contact filters/segments with links to edit each one.

nodes.name: settings_general.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view for general application configuration (organization info, defaults, and global preferences).

nodes.name: settings_group_edit.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view for creating/editing a contact group, including membership management within the group.

nodes.name: settings_groups.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view listing contact groups, with an import/merge helper rendering rows via an inline callback.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a local closure (_renderImportCb) to render import preview rows with HTML-escaped values.

nodes.name: settings_health.php
nodes.summary: Admin health/observability panel showing app version, runtime, DB server info, pending/applied migrations, drift detection, and activity counters — used to diagnose deployments without SSH access.
nodes.languageNotes: Wraps risky diagnostics (shell_exec, DB queries) in try/catch closures so failures degrade gracefully rather than breaking the page.

nodes.name: settings_integrity.php
nodes.summary: Admin settings view for running and reviewing database integrity/consistency checks (orphaned records, referential issues) across the CRM data.

nodes.name: suivi_delete_confirm.php
nodes.summary: Confirmation dialog view asking the user to confirm deletion of a follow-up ('suivi') entry.

nodes.name: suivi_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Form view for creating or editing a contact follow-up ('suivi') entry.

nodes.name: suivi_last_entry.php
nodes.summary: View displaying the most recent follow-up ('suivi') entry for a contact, typically shown on the contact detail page.

nodes.name: suivi_list.php
nodes.summary: View listing all follow-up ('suivi') entries for a contact in chronological order.

nodes.name: users_add_form.php
nodes.summary: Form view for adding a new application (back-office) user account, including role and locale selection.

nodes.name: users_anonymize.php
nodes.summary: Confirmation view that anonymizes a member's personal data on request (GDPR-style erasure) while preserving accounting records, showing a compta-record count warning before submission.

nodes.name: users_delete_confirm.php
nodes.summary: Confirmation dialog letting an admin choose to archive (deactivate) or permanently delete a member record, posting to the deleteOrDeactivateUser action.

nodes.name: users_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Main member detail page shell: computes donation/cotisation statistics, renders the tab navigation (general data, compta, suivi, history) and the active/archived status toggle, then includes the appropriate sub-view for the selected tab.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy inline SQL aggregation (CASE/SUM) to compute per-member donation/cotisation stats directly in the view rather than a service layer.

nodes.name: users_general_data.php
nodes.summary: Inline view/edit panel for a member's contact fields (identity, address, phones, comment) using Alpine.js state and a JSON PUT to the contacts API, with a read-only display mode and a form-based edit mode.

nodes.name: users_history.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only audit history tab listing all logged actions for a given member from the audit_log table, rendered as a sortable DataTable.

nodes.name: users_inactive.php
nodes.summary: Settings page listing archived (deactivated) members with a per-row unarchive action confirmed via a shared modal.

nodes.name: users_list.php
nodes.summary: Main member listing view: parses search/segment/contact-type/sort query parameters, resolves the current segment or quick-filter title/description, and renders the searchable, filterable member table (with AJAX search support when no complex server-side filter is active).

nodes.name: users_member_of.php
nodes.summary: Handles segment (group) assignment/unassignment toast messages and renders the panel of segments a member belongs to versus available segments, grouped by category.

nodes.name: users_merge.php
nodes.summary: Duplicate-member merge UI: loads two contact records, computes compta/suivi/segment stats for each, builds a per-field diff (divergent values with a default winner), and renders an Alpine-driven side-by-side merge screen.

nodes.name: index.php
nodes.summary: Application entry point: enforces auth, loads locale/bootstrap/model classes, and either returns an htmx partial fragment or renders the full HTML page shell (head assets, nav, pending-migration/local-SMTP warning banners, main content, toast, footer).
nodes.languageNotes: Dual rendering mode: htmx requests skip the layout and return only the routed view fragment, full requests render the complete HTML document.

nodes.name: getMicroTime
nodes.summary: Returns the current time as a float (seconds since epoch) used to measure page render duration for the footer's process-time display.

nodes.name: install.php
nodes.summary: Standalone first-run web installer wizard: checks prerequisites, writes conf/db.php, creates the full embedded schema (idempotent CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS), seeds organisation settings, and creates the admin account, redirecting to the app once conf/db.php exists with an admin.
nodes.languageNotes: Embeds the entire DB schema as a heredoc SQL string so the installer has no external file dependency.

nodes.name: installerPdo
nodes.summary: Builds and returns a PDO connection for installer-time database operations, guarded by defined() checks for required connection constants.

nodes.name: app.js
nodes.summary: Application-wide JavaScript: CSRF token propagation to htmx/native forms, the global dirty-form guard (markDirty/beforeunload/htmx interception), and re-initialization of jQuery plugins (datepicker, DataTables) after htmx swaps via casaInit.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the project-wide dirty-form guard contract documented in CLAUDE.md (data-no-dirty exclusions, __dirtyOverride flag).

nodes.name: casaInit
nodes.summary: Re-initializes jQuery datepicker/datetimepicker widgets and destroys stale DataTables instances within a given root element after an htmx content swap.

nodes.name: dt_defaults.js
nodes.summary: Shared default configuration for DataTables instances used across the app (loaded once in the page head).

nodes.name: member-general-form.js
nodes.summary: Alpine.js component backing the member general-data inline edit panel: holds view/edit state, syncs the TipTap comment editor on entering edit mode, formats dates, and saves changes via a JSON PUT to the contacts API.

nodes.name: memberGeneralForm
nodes.summary: Alpine component factory returning the state object and methods (init, startEdit, formatDate, save) for the member general-data inline edit form, including data-attribute parsing and the fetch-based save call to PUT /api/contacts/{id}.

nodes.name: tiptap-editor.js
nodes.summary: Wires up the self-hosted TipTap rich text editor for the member comment field, including toolbar button bindings (bold/italic/lists/undo/redo) and toolbar active-state syncing, re-initialized on every htmx swap.
nodes.languageNotes: Loaded as an ES module importing a self-hosted TipTap bundle to avoid an external CDN dependency, tightening the CSP.

nodes.name: initTiptap
nodes.summary: Creates a TipTap Editor instance bound to the comment field's hidden textarea and wires toolbar button click handlers to editor chain commands (bold, italic, lists, undo, redo).

nodes.name: updateToolbar
nodes.summary: Toggles the active CSS state of toolbar buttons to reflect the current TipTap editor selection/formatting state.

nodes.name: destroyTiptap
nodes.summary: Tears down the TipTap editor instance for a given root element, used before an htmx swap discards the DOM node.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache access rule denying all direct HTTP access to the locales directory, since locale files are PHP includes only.

nodes.name: resources_fr.php
nodes.summary: Base French locale bundle: the complete set of user-facing UI strings ($GLOBAL[...]), serving as the default and fallback for all other language overlays (en/de/es).
nodes.languageNotes: Acts as the canonical/fallback locale per the project's i18n convention — any key missing from another language file falls back to this one.

nodes.name: log4php.properties
nodes.summary: Log4php logging configuration setting appender and log level defaults for the application (legacy logging config, minimal in scope).

nodes.name: login.php
nodes.summary: Public login page: sets secure session cookie params, validates credentials via authLogin with a CSRF token check, logs failed attempts with a brute-force delay, and redirects to the app or forced password-change flow on success.

nodes.name: members.iml
nodes.summary: JetBrains IDE module configuration file for the PHP project, defining content roots and PHP interpreter settings for IntelliJ/PhpStorm.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache access rule denying all direct HTTP access to the migrations directory, since SQL migration files must ship under the webroot but never be served.

nodes.name: set-password.php
nodes.summary: Public, unauthenticated token-based password setup page for newly invited users: validates the reset token and expiry, enforces minimum password length/match, and activates the account by clearing the reset token on success.

nodes.name: backup.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that dumps the MemberBase MySQL/MariaDB database to a timestamped SQL file using mysqldump with consistent, non-locking options, resolving DB credentials from env vars or conf/db.php.

nodes.name: migrate.php
nodes.summary: CLI runner for versioned, replayable database migrations (apply pending, --status with drift detection via checksum, --baseline for fresh installs); shares core logic with the web admin via includes/lib/migrations.php.
nodes.languageNotes: CLI-only guard (exits if not PHP_SAPI cli), resolves DB config from conf/db.php or env vars, and tracks per-migration SHA-256 checksums to flag drift when an already-applied file is edited.

nodes.name: restore.sh
nodes.summary: Destructive database restore script that loads a SQL dump (produced by backup.sh) into MariaDB, resolving DB credentials from environment variables or conf/db.php.

nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright test runner configuration: sets the base URL, admin auth storage state, serial (non-parallel) execution, and wires a 'setup' project running global-setup.ts before the chromium test project.

nodes.name: api.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test suite covering the REST API endpoints under /api/* (auth, roles, JSON responses), the largest spec file in the suite.

nodes.name: app-users.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for application user management: listing, creating, and deleting app users, run serially since operations build on prior state.

nodes.name: auth.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for the login/authentication flow, using the shared login() helper from tests/helpers/login.ts.

nodes.name: change-password.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test verifying the password change flow and subsequent restoration of the original password, using a full-page POST (hx-boost disabled) to avoid htmx race conditions.

nodes.name: compta-types.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for accounting-type settings: adding and deleting a compta type from the settings UI.

nodes.name: compta.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for the accounting (compta) module covering cotisation entries and related bookkeeping flows.

nodes.name: db-maintenance.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test for the admin Health page's database maintenance feature, verifying database export works without SSH access.

nodes.name: dirty-guard.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests validating the global dirty-form guard (unsaved-changes popup on navigation/htmx requests) and its data-no-dirty exclusions.

nodes.name: filter-parity.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test verifying that list-view filters behave consistently (parity) across different listing pages.

nodes.name: global-setup.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright global setup: resets the test database via fixtures/reset-db.sh, then logs in as each seeded role (admin, manager, user, readonly) and persists their auth storage state files for reuse across the whole test suite.

nodes.name: globalSetup
nodes.summary: Default-exported Playwright global setup function that resets the test DB and logs in as every seeded persona, writing per-role storage-state JSON files under tests/.auth/.

nodes.name: groups.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for member group management (create/edit/list groups).

nodes.name: health.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test for the admin Health page, verifying its basic rendering and content.

nodes.name: login.ts
nodes.summary: Shared Playwright test helper that logs a user in through the login form and waits for post-login navigation, reused across auth-dependent E2E specs.

nodes.name: login
nodes.summary: Fills the login form with the given username/password, clicks submit, and waits for navigation to complete — the standard login entry point used by dependent test specs.

nodes.name: inactive-members.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for the inactive-members listing and reactivation flow (users.status filtering).

nodes.name: members.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for core member CRUD flows (create, view, edit member records).

nodes.name: merge-users.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for merging two member records into one, verifying data consolidation and cleanup of the duplicate.

nodes.name: mobile-roles.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests validating role-based UI behavior on mobile viewport contexts, using per-role storage-state files.

nodes.name: personas.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests exercising different user personas/roles through both UI (browser context) and API (request context) helpers to verify permission boundaries.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Playwright E2E test suite: prerequisites, how to run tests, configuration reference, an index of test files and what each covers, seed test data, and testing conventions (serial blocks, htmx race workarounds).

nodes.name: resume.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test covering the member "resume" (summary/dashboard) view, verifying key data renders correctly for a logged-in user.

nodes.name: roles.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Large Playwright E2E suite validating role-based access control across the app, including a CSRF guard describe block covering the actions.php POST dispatcher, using per-role browser storage states and API request contexts.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines reusable helpers (stateFile, openAs, apiAs, csrfFor) to open browser contexts or API request contexts under a given saved auth state, and to scrape a fresh CSRF token from a page load.

nodes.name: stateFile
nodes.summary: Resolves the filesystem path to a saved Playwright storage-state file for a given role.

nodes.name: openAs
nodes.summary: Opens a new browser context and page using a role's saved storage state, for role-scoped E2E scenarios.

nodes.name: apiAs
nodes.summary: Creates a Playwright API request context authenticated as a given role via its saved storage state, for direct HTTP/API-level assertions.

nodes.name: csrfFor
nodes.summary: Fetches index.php and scrapes the CSRF meta token from the returned HTML, used to build valid POST requests in CSRF guard tests.

nodes.name: route-guards.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E suite verifying that unauthenticated or unauthorized navigation to protected routes is correctly redirected or blocked.

nodes.name: schema-drift.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Guards against schema drift by parsing the CREATE TABLE statements embedded in install.php and comparing them against the live database schema, ensuring the installer stays in sync with migrations.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements a small hand-rolled SQL CREATE TABLE parser (parseSchema) rather than depending on a full SQL parser library.

nodes.name: parseSchema
nodes.summary: Parses raw SQL text into a map of table name to normalized column definitions, used to diff two schema sources (installer vs live DB).

nodes.name: loadEmbeddedSchema
nodes.summary: Reads install.php from disk and extracts the embedded full-schema SQL block for comparison against the live database.

nodes.name: security-log.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E tests verifying that failed login attempts and denied access events are recorded in the application's security audit log.

nodes.name: settings.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test covering the Réglages (Settings) page, including admin-only sections such as database health and migrations.

nodes.name: suivi.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test covering the "suivi" (follow-up/task tracking) feature, exercising task creation, due dates, and overdue-state display.

nodes.name: tiptap.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test guarding against regressions in the self-hosted TipTap rich-text editor bundle by asserting the ProseMirror editor mounts on the member form.

nodes.name: bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: PHPUnit bootstrap for the pure-logic unit test suite; defines APP_ENTRY and requires only side-effect-free library files (locale, pure helpers, import field helpers, Compta entity) without opening a DB connection.

nodes.name: ImportFieldsTest.php
nodes.summary: PHPUnit unit tests for the CSV import field-mapping helpers, covering sex-value normalization, field value passthrough, and consistency between the allowed-fields list and their labels.

nodes.name: ImportFieldsTest
nodes.summary: PHPUnit TestCase exercising the pure functions importNormalizeSexe, importFieldValue, importFieldLabels and importAllowedFields from html/includes/lib/import_fields.php.

nodes.name: sexeCases
nodes.summary: PHPUnit data provider supplying raw/expected value pairs for the sexe-normalization test.

nodes.name: testAllowedFieldsMatchLabels
nodes.summary: Asserts that every key in importAllowedFields() has a corresponding label in importFieldLabels(), preventing drift between the two lists.

nodes.name: PureHelpersTest.php
nodes.summary: Large PHPUnit suite covering the pure-logic helper library: date conversion/formatting, salutation building, template rendering, cotisation reminder variable assembly, comment whitespace normalization, Swiss IDE formatting, compta-type color/return-URL validation, contact-type classification, task priority/overdue logic, default view resolution, and allowed compta-type-ID restriction.
nodes.languageNotes: Tests target html/includes/lib/pure.php exclusively — functions with no DB or session dependency, run outside the normal APP_ENTRY bootstrap for fast, isolated execution.

nodes.name: PureHelpersTest
nodes.summary: PHPUnit TestCase with ~48 test methods asserting the behavior of every pure helper function used across date handling, member communications, and business-rule validation.

nodes.name: testCotiReminderVarsContainsExpectedKeys
nodes.summary: Verifies that mbBuildCotiReminderVars() returns the full expected set of template variable keys for a fake member, and that basic member fields are correctly mapped.

nodes.name: assert.sh
nodes.summary: Shell assertion helper library sourced by the upgrade/migration CI test scripts, providing quoting and failure-reporting helpers (q, fail) used to validate database state during upgrade tests.

nodes.name: views.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test covering navigation between the app's main list/detail views, checking that each view renders its expected content.

nodes.name: dashboard.php
nodes.summary: New default-adjacent landing view (#153) showing role-filtered KPI cards (contributions, donors, active members with a revenue line chart and donation-type pie), an inline debounced contact search, and a shortcuts panel linking to the peopleFinance and journals hubs plus recent compta/contact tables.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy inline JS (autocomplete combobox with ARIA roles, two Chart.js instances) embedded directly in the PHP view; all figures reuse mbComputeDonorKpis() from lib/donor.php to stay consistent with the donors_summary tab.

nodes.name: people_finance.php
nodes.summary: Unified 'Membres & finances' tab-shell hub (#164) that renders five formerly-standalone views (members list, compta recap, donors summary, lapsed/new members, lapsed/new donors) as Bootstrap tabs, each isolated via a closure to prevent variable-name collisions since all panes execute server-side on every request.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a closure (`$_pfRequireIsolated`) capturing only the bootstrap globals each sub-view needs, then `extract()`s per-tab variables — a deliberate scope-isolation pattern for embedding independently-written views that were never designed to coexist in a single request.

nodes.name: journals.php
nodes.summary: 'Journaux' tab-shell hub combining the compta activity log and the suivi (task/notes) activity log into two Bootstrap tabs, following the same closure-isolation pattern as people_finance.php's hub.
nodes.languageNotes: Smaller sibling of the people_finance.php hub pattern — only two tabs, no nested cohort pills.

nodes.name: contact_type.php
nodes.summary: Library for the contact_type feature (#165): validates contact type IDs, auto-generates unique slug-like codes for new types, and manages the contact_type × compta_type restriction matrix (which accounting entry types are selectable for a given contact type).

nodes.name: mbValidContactTypeId
nodes.summary: Returns the given contact type ID if it exists in the contact_type table, otherwise falls back to a default — guards against invalid or stale contact_type_id values submitted from forms.

nodes.name: mbGenerateContactTypeCode
nodes.summary: Slugifies a contact type label into a short lowercase code (ASCII-folded, alphanumeric+underscore) and appends a numeric suffix if needed to guarantee uniqueness against existing codes.

nodes.name: mbContactTypeComptaMatrix
nodes.summary: Loads the full contact_type × compta_type restriction matrix as a map of contact_type_id to its list of allowed compta_type_ids, used to render the settings matrix table and to filter compta type choices per contact.

nodes.name: mbSaveContactTypeComptaMatrixRow
nodes.summary: Persists one column of the contact_type × compta_type matrix inside a transaction: validates the contact type and compta type IDs, deletes existing restriction rows for that contact type, then re-inserts the selected compta_type_ids (an empty selection means 'no restriction').

nodes.name: mbAllowedComptaTypeIdsForContact
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective list of compta_type_ids selectable for a given contact, based on that contact's contact_type_id and the restriction matrix (falling back to all compta types when unrestricted).

nodes.name: settings_contact_types.php
nodes.summary: Contact type management UI (#165): add/rename/delete custom contact types with per-type FontAwesome icon, and an interactive checkbox matrix mapping each contact type to its allowed accounting (compta) types, auto-saved per column via fetch/htmx.
nodes.languageNotes: Client-side matrix auto-save posts one column at a time via fetch() with the CSRF token helper, independent of the page's dirty-form guard since it's not a traditional submit form.

nodes.name: contacts.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for contact records: updateUser (with before/after audit diff), mergeUsers (transactional merge of compta/properties/segments with survivor selection), anonymizeUser, deactivateUser, deleteOrDeactivateUser (with full-field audit trail before erasure), reactivateUser, and addUser (assigns a validated contact_type_id and optional originating segment).
nodes.languageNotes: mergeUsers wraps all cross-table writes (compta, contact_properties, contact_segment, and disposal of the source row) in a single PDO transaction with rollback on failure to avoid orphaned records.

nodes.name: segments.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for segment (group) management: delete/force-delete, reassign, bulk import members from other segments, import cotisants/donors by year and threshold, bulk hide/show with session-based undo toast, combined-segment bulk creation, auto-generated lapsed-member/lapsed-donor segments, CRUD (add/rename/update), member assignment, and cascade-rule management.
nodes.languageNotes: Manager-only gate at the top of the file; several actions build dynamic SQL IN-clause placeholders from the org's cotisation compta_type_ids to compute lapsed cohorts.

nodes.name: combined_segments.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for combined segments (segment groupings used as categories or filters): reordering, category (re)assignment per segment, bulk membership updates with mutual-exclusivity enforcement for categories, and CRUD for the combined_segment entity itself.
nodes.languageNotes: updateCombinedSegmentMembers evicts a segment from any other non-filter (category) combined_segment before assigning it to the new one, enforcing that a segment belongs to at most one category.

nodes.name: attestation_email.php
nodes.summary: Sends donation attestation PDFs by email, individually or in bulk for a given year and minimum-sum threshold; always applies the stamp/signature overlay on emailed copies (unlike opt-in direct downloads) and skips donors already sent one this year unless force-resent.
nodes.languageNotes: Returns pure JSON (buffers cleared with ob_end_clean loop) for all four actions — this is an AJAX-only handler, not a page-redirecting one.

nodes.name: compta_recap.php
nodes.summary: Sends accounting-entry recap emails to members with unnotified compta rows, grouped by member (one email per member covering all their pending entries), plus single-member preview/send variants and a one-time admin bulk-mark-as-notified action to avoid flooding members with historical data on rollout.
nodes.languageNotes: Redirect target is hub-aware: it stays inside the peopleFinance tab shell (#164) if the request originated there, instead of always bouncing to the standalone comptaRecap route.

nodes.name: cotisation_reminder.php
nodes.summary: Sends cotisation (membership fee) reminder emails, individually or in bulk, to members who paid last year but not this year; attaches a generated QR-bill payment slip PDF and can auto-close a linked suivi task when sent from a task's 'send reminder' button.
nodes.languageNotes: The QR-bill PDF is generated once per bulk run and reused across all recipients rather than regenerated per member, since the slip content doesn't vary by recipient.

nodes.name: suivi_tasks.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for suivi (follow-up) tasks: add/update/close/reopen/delete a task, plus a manager-only bulk generator that creates tasks for members with unpaid cotisations for a given year.

nodes.name: donor.php
nodes.summary: Business-logic library computing donor-cohort KPIs (lapsed, loyal, new donors) and the aggregated donor dashboard statistics (retention rate, monthly totals, YTD figures) used by the dashboard/donor hub view.

nodes.name: mbGetLapsedDonors
nodes.summary: Queries donors who gave in the prior year but not in the given year, returning the lapsed-donor cohort.

nodes.name: mbGetLoyalDonors
nodes.summary: Queries donors who gave in both the current and prior year, identifying the loyal-donor cohort.

nodes.name: mbGetNewDonors
nodes.summary: Queries donors who gave for the first time in the given year (no prior-year donation), identifying the new-donor cohort.

nodes.name: mbComputeDonorKpis
nodes.summary: Aggregates the full set of donor dashboard KPIs: donor counts, retention rate, YTD totals, per-type breakdowns, and monthly donation series for the given year.

nodes.name: cotisation.php
nodes.summary: Business-logic library identifying membership-fee (cotisation) cohorts: lapsed members, new members, and members already sent a payment reminder, used for the reminder/dashboard workflows.

nodes.name: mbGetLapsedMembers
nodes.summary: Finds members who paid the given cotisation type(s) in a prior year but not the current one, excluding those in the no-cotisation segment.

nodes.name: mbGetNewMembers
nodes.summary: Finds members who paid a cotisation type for the first time in the given year.

nodes.name: mbGetAlreadyRemindedIds
nodes.summary: Returns member IDs that already received a cotisation reminder for the given year, used to avoid duplicate reminder sends.

nodes.name: compta_recap.php
nodes.summary: Loads accounting (compta) entries for a given user/year and builds the template variables for the accounting recap document (line items, totals, salutation, formatted amounts).

nodes.name: mbRecapLoadEntries
nodes.summary: Loads compta entries for the recap, optionally filtered by user and year, forcing inclusion when requested.

nodes.name: mbRecapSinceLine
nodes.summary: Builds the human-readable 'entries since' date label line shown on the recap document.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: MemberBase is a nonprofit CRM for managing members, donors, accounting entries, and follow-up tasks, built on plain PHP 8.2, MariaDB, Bootstrap 5.3, and htmx (no SPA framework). The README covers the feature set: member management, segments, accounting (compta), donation attestations, exports, and settings. Start here to get the product vocabulary before diving into how the code implements it.

tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: index.php is the single PHP entry point for every authenticated page: it enforces auth, loads the locale/bootstrap/model classes, and then either renders a full HTML page shell or returns an htmx partial fragment for in-page navigation. This request/response split (full page vs. fragment) is the backbone of the app's htmx-driven UI and explains why almost every view file needs to support both rendering modes.
tour.languageLesson: htmx apps commonly branch server-side on a request header (e.g. HX-Request) to decide whether to return a full page or just the swapped fragment, avoiding duplicate templates.

tour.title: Auth, CSRF, and Bootstrap
tour.description: auth.php resolves the session user, enforces role guards (isAdmin/isManager/canWrite/canRead), and issues/verifies CSRF tokens; bootstrap.php provides the shared PDO connection, base URL helper, and the audit log writer used everywhere. Every request that reaches index.php or the routers depends on these two files first, making them the true foundation layer beneath the rest of the app.

tour.title: GET/POST Routing
tour.description: views.php is the central GET dispatcher: it resolves a requested view name against a route table, enforces the matching role guard, handles legacy view redirects, and includes the target view file. actions.php is its POST counterpart: it enforces CSRF verification before routing each named action to a handler file via a static action-to-handler map. Together they are the traffic cops that connect index.php's single entry point to dozens of view and action files without hardcoding logic per route.

tour.title: Domain Model and Schema
tour.description: The Contact class is the domain model for a member/donor record: hydration from DB rows, segment membership, cotisation/donation history checks, and persistence. It maps directly onto the contact table in the SQL schema, with contact_type as a lookup table categorizing contacts (individual, company, institution). This model is the most depended-upon symbol in the codebase (highest fan-in), so understanding it unlocks most of the views and actions that follow.
tour.languageLesson: PHP domain classes here follow an active-record-ish style: the class owns both hydration (fromRow) and persistence (save), rather than separating those concerns into a repository layer.

tour.title: The contact_type Domain (v5.2.0)
tour.description: contact_type.php is new in v5.2.0: it validates contact type IDs, auto-generates unique slug-like codes for new types, and manages the contact_type x compta_type restriction matrix that determines which accounting entry types are allowed for a given contact type. settings_contact_types.php is the admin UI on top of it, letting an administrator add/rename/delete contact types and edit that matrix as an interactive checkbox grid. This is a good example of how a small domain library plus a settings view plus a schema table form one complete vertical feature slice.

tour.title: The Dashboard: New Default Landing View
tour.description: dashboard.php is the new default-adjacent landing view introduced in v5.2.0: it shows role-filtered KPI cards (contributions, donors, active members with a revenue chart and donation-type pie), plus an inline debounced contact search. It pulls its cohort statistics from two business-logic libraries, cotisation.php (lapsed/new members, reminder status) and donor.php (lapsed/loyal/new donor KPIs and retention rate), which is why those two libraries sit directly behind it as its main dependencies.

tour.title: The Hub Tab-Shell Pattern
tour.description: From the dashboard, two links lead into 'hub' views that consolidate what used to be several standalone pages into one tabbed screen. people_finance.php is the 'Membres & finances' hub, rendering five formerly-standalone views (members list, compta recap, donors summary, lapsed/new members, lapsed/new donors) as Bootstrap tabs. journals.php is the 'Compta/Suivi' hub, combining the accounting activity log and the follow-up/task activity log into two tabs using the same closure-isolation pattern. Both hubs share hub-tabs.js, which rewrites legacy in-tab links to the new hub URL scheme and syncs the active tab to the ?tab=/?cohort= query string so a tab is bookmarkable and shareable.
tour.languageLesson: Closure-isolation in PHP views means each tab's rendering code is wrapped in its own function scope (e.g. an IIFE-style closure) so that five formerly-independent view files can be concatenated into one page without their local variables colliding.

tour.title: Pure Helpers and Business Rules
tour.description: pure.php holds dependency-free helper functions used throughout the app: date/timestamp conversion, salutation building, template variable rendering, and Swiss IBAN/IDE formatting. Because these functions take no PDO connection and have no side effects, they're the only production code directly reachable from PHPUnit's unit-test suite, which is why the project keeps them deliberately isolated from bootstrap.php and auth.php.

tour.title: REST API Layer
tour.description: Alongside the htmx views, MemberBase exposes a small JSON REST API under /api for the pieces that need direct client-side data access: compta.php (accounting entries CRUD, filtered by date/type), suivi.php (follow-up/tracking entries CRUD), and segments.php (segment membership CRUD, including add/remove member operations). Every write here goes through the same audit logging convention seen in bootstrap.php and the action handlers, keeping the audit trail consistent regardless of entry point.

tour.title: Global Frontend Behavior
tour.description: app.js is the application-wide JavaScript companion to every page: it propagates the CSRF token to htmx and native form submissions, implements the global dirty-form guard that warns before navigating away from unsaved changes, and re-initializes jQuery plugins (datepicker, DataTables, etc.) after each htmx swap. Any page-specific JS, including hub-tabs.js from Step 8, relies on the conventions this file establishes for htmx lifecycle hooks.

tour.title: Locale and i18n
tour.description: resources_fr.php is the base locale bundle (French, the default) exposed via $GLOBAL and referenced by every view instead of hardcoded UI strings; per-language files layer on top and fall back to French for missing keys. This is the file with the single highest fan-in in the whole graph, reflecting the project's strict no-hardcoded-labels convention: essentially every view and partial depends on it.

tour.title: Containerized Local Environment
tour.description: The Dockerfile builds the PHP/Apache runtime image, installing GD (with freetype/jpeg support for QR-bill rendering) and pdftk-java for PDF attestations, and enabling the Apache modules the app needs (rewrite, headers, deflate, brotli). docker-compose.yml orchestrates this image alongside MariaDB, Mailpit (SMTP testing), and Adminer for local development, with health-checked startup ordering so the app container waits for the database to be ready.
tour.languageLesson: docker-compose health checks combined with depends_on ensure a dependent service (the PHP app) only starts after MariaDB reports healthy, avoiding race-condition connection failures on cold start.

tour.title: CI: Unit and End-to-End Tests
tour.description: unit.yml runs the PHPUnit suite against pure.php-style dependency-free logic on PHP 8.2, matching production. e2e.yml boots the full app via Docker Compose (with test overrides), resets the test database, and runs the Playwright browser suite covering real user flows like login, imports, and the dirty-form guard. Together these two pipelines are the safety net that must stay green before any release, tying back to everything explored in this tour, from auth and routing to the dashboard and hub views.
tour.languageLesson: GitHub Actions workflows separate concerns by job: one job can build/start services, a later step waits for a health endpoint, and only then does the test-runner step execute, preventing flaky failures from a not-yet-ready server.

tour.title: Architecture Reference
tour.description: doc/architecture.md is the living technical reference documenting request flows (GET via htmx vs. POST actions), the layered architecture, the database schema, and the domain classes (User, Team, Compta, Metagroup, UserProperty). Now that you've walked through the entry point, routing, domain model, the v5.2.0 dashboard/hub/contact_type additions, the API layer, and the supporting infrastructure, this document is the map to keep coming back to as you extend the app further.
